data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Instagram minimizes decision-making time by offering streamlined and simplified navigation.
data.technical_spec: Optimizes the number of options presented to users to ensure faster decision-making.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Interactive elements are sized and positioned based on ease of use and accessibility.
data.technical_spec: Ensures interactive targets like buttons are easily clickable on various devices.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Instagram's visually appealing interface enhances user satisfaction and engagement.
data.technical_spec: Consistent use of colors, typography, and imagery aligned with visual design principles.

data.title: Serial Position Effect
data.description: Critical features like Stories are positioned for immediate visibility and interaction.
data.technical_spec: Leverages primacy and recency effects by placing important elements at the screen's forefront.

data.title: Law of Proximity
data.description: Interface elements are grouped together to indicate they are related, simplifying navigation.
data.technical_spec: Ensures logical layouts through the careful arrangement of UI components.
